title: Navitas Semiconductor Corp (NVTS) Q4 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Navitas Semiconductor Corp (NASDAQ: NVTS) will release Q4 2024 earnings on February 24, 2025. The consensus estimates anticipate Q4 2024 revenue of $19.03 million and Q4 2024 EPS of -$0.14 per share. For the full year 2024, revenue is expected at $84.40 million and full year 2024 EPS at -$0.39 per share. Revenue and earnings projections have remained stable at $84.40 million for the full year 2024 and at $89.00 million for 2025 over the past 90 days. In Q3 2024, the company missed revenue expectations by 1.14% but beat earnings estimates by 32.89%, with the stock declining 9.58% following the announcement. Eight analysts project an average one-year price target of $3.81 (current price: $3.18), implying 19.88% upside potential. The company carries an Outperform consensus rating from nine brokerage firms. GuruFocus estimates suggest potential 105.67% upside based on their valuation model.
